title: henckelia lancifolia
intro: Henckelia lancifolia, also known as the lance-leaf henckelia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Gesneriaceae. This plant is traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Henckelia lancifolia include its potential to treat various ailments such as fever, cough, and skin conditions, due to its immunomodulatory and antioxidant properties. In herbal preparations, Henckelia lancifolia is often used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions, and it is also used in traditional Indian medicine as a powder or capsule.
